dynamodb_tables.purpose: Store user profile data (name) - credentials handled by Cognito

post_confirmation.purpose: Create user profile entry in UserProfiles table after successful registration

shared_layers.name: dynamodb-utils
shared_layers.description: Shared DynamoDB client configuration and helper functions

table_initialization.strategy: Custom Resource Lambda during CloudFormation deployment
table_initialization.description: Create table with userId (Cognito Sub) as partition key and todoId as sort key

table_initialization.strategy: Custom Resource Lambda during CloudFormation deployment
table_initialization.description: Create table with userId (Cognito Sub) as partition key

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by Cognito User Pool - Frontend calls AWS Amplify Auth.signUp()
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: import { Auth } from 'aws-amplify'; await Auth.signUp({username: email, password, attributes: {email, name}})

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by Cognito User Pool - Frontend calls AWS Amplify Auth.signIn()
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: import { Auth } from 'aws-amplify'; await Auth.signIn(email, password)

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by API Gateway Cognito Authorizer - Token validation at gateway layer, not in Lambda code
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: API Gateway automatically validates JWT tokens from Authorization header

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by API Gateway Cognito Authorizer - Token validation at gateway layer, not in Lambda code
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: API Gateway automatically validates JWT tokens from Authorization header

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by Cognito User Pool - Tokens generated and managed by Cognito
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: Cognito automatically generates JWT tokens after successful authentication

dropped_functions.reason: Infrastructure script - Table creation handled by SAM template CloudFormation resources
User authentication moved to Cognito User Pool - Profile data (name) kept in UserProfiles table with Cognito Sub as key
Password management handled by Cognito User Pool with secure hashing
